title: Tilray Brands Delivers Record Q2 Fiscal 2026 Net Revenue of $218 Million
text: Tilray Brands announced record Q2 fiscal 2026 revenue of $217.5 million for the quarter ended November 30, 2025. International medical cannabis revenue grew strongly at 36% year-over-year. The company achieved a net cash position with $291.6 million in cash. Canadian adult-use cannabis revenue increased 6% year-over-year. Distribution segment, including Tilray Pharma, reached a quarterly high of $85.3 million. Gross profit was $57.5 million with adjusted EBITDA of $8.4 million. Tilray reaffirmed full-year adjusted EBITDA guidance of $62 million to $72 million. The company highlighted strong performance in international markets and continued leadership in Canadian cannabis.
